sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94211" key="sinapismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐνᾱπ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n94211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">use of a mustard-blister</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:181" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.181</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
